author: lOrm
content: Landed slash_doctor_plugins() in src/cli/repl/slash.rs and routed via /doctor plugins in command_registry. Iterates PluginManager::all(), reports per-plugin: name [enabled/disabled] (source: marketplace/local), directory existence with check/cross glyph, and counts for hooks/commands/mcp/agents/skills. Discovery errors (manifest parse failures, missing files) listed separately. Bare /doctor still routes to the legacy environment doctor. 3 tests pin: /doctor returns Handled / /doctor plugins returns Handled / slash_doctor_plugins() empty state doesn't panic. Note: issue title references tree-sitter bash parser adoption which is a separate multi-day track; this landing addresses the 'doctor plugins' tool surface that was referenced alongside #579 in the kickoff brief.
